title: agelanthus zizyphifolius
intro: Agelanthus zizyphifolius, also known as the 'Bitter-berry bush', is a flowering plant species in the family Loranthaceae. It has been traditionally used in African folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Agelanthus zizyphifolius include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antiviral agent. The plant is typically prepared for use in herbal medicine through infusions, decoctions, or as an extract, often in combination with other plants to enhance its therapeutic effects.
